name: Credential Manager credentials were restored from backup
definition: Windows Security Event ID 5377 records Credential Manager credentials were restored from backup.
trigger_scenarios: Windows logs the event when the audited security operation occurs.

key_fields.explanation: Restoring Credential Manager data from a backup path under C:\\Users\\ can import stolen credentials; correlate the Subject Logon ID with later 4624 use.
The initiating account and Logon ID support attribution and correlation to 4624 and 4688.
The affected host determines the operational impact.

false_positives: Documented maintenance, policy changes, or approved administration can generate this event.
Validate change control and host role before suppressing.
detection_notes: Restoring Credential Manager data from a backup path under C:\\Users\\ can import stolen credentials; correlate the Subject Logon ID with later 4624 use. This is a T1555 Credentials from Password Stores signal; preserve the concrete value and correlate the actor, process, and related events.
kql_snippet:
SecurityEvent
| where EventID == 5377
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account
